name: LiteServer
notes:
Private peering with 40/100/400Gbps interfaces only.
  
In case of 40Gbps interfaces we prefer link aggregation with a minimum of 80Gbps.
  
- PNI (N x 10/40/100Gbps) @ KoloDC DC1, Dronten, NL (new request no longer accepted)
- PNI (N x 40/100/400Gbps) @ Digital Realty Amsterdam AMS3, AMS5-8, AMS10, Amsterdam, NL  
- PNI (N x 40/100Gbps) @ NIKHEF, Amsterdam, NL
  
Our general peering policy:  
- At least 50Mbps of traffic for peering on public internet exchanges. Private peering preferred with traffic levels exceeding 5Gbps+  
- At least 1Gbps of traffic for private peering.
